relations.note: Constrains the background asset used by the main layout rule.
Locks the button radius within the callout style.
Skip procedure applies when the rare skip condition of the asset rule is met.
Headline copy fills the styled headline element.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

**Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

**Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.
### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images.

rules.intent: Lock the signature gradient callout CTA layout, colors, and typography.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA Section is a full-width banner with a headline and a single button, both horizontally centered and stacked over the branded orange/yellow gradient PNG background. The background image (asset Gradient_callout.png) is applied as the section background sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the full 600px content width, and MUST always carry a solid background-color fallback of Sunshine (#faa31b) since clients like Outlook drop background images. The headline is Brand Blue (#00529b), centered in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800 (font.email.cta_stack), ~28px, one line. The button is centered in the lower-middle below the headline: Deep Blue (#003D74) fill, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold (#FFC20E) arrow › at 24px after two non-breaking spaces, sized 248 × 64px. Section padding is 48px 25px 56px 25px.
rules.snippets:
<mj-section
    background-url="https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png"
    background-size="cover"
    background-repeat="no-repeat"
    background-position="center center"
    background-color="#faa31b"
    padding="48px 25px 56px 25px">

quotes:
background-color="#faa31b"
    padding="48px 25px 56px 25px">

asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.
do not re-host or recolor.

The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical.

rules.intent: Preserve the approved gradient asset and constrain when it can be omitted.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout background is the fixed hosted asset (Gradient_callout.png); do not re-host or recolor it. The background image may be skipped only in very, very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, or a hard size budget); when skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine (#faa31b) fill and every other rule stays identical.

quotes: `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape

**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Preserve the signature asymmetric button shape exactly.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout button uses the mandatory four-value asymmetric signature radius (border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) on every instance, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

quotes: border-radius:49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;

rules.intent: Ensure image-skip fallback preserves brand fill and locked treatments.
